source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
reference: "Tá lucha 4 mhí d’aois againn anois a bhíodh diaibéiteach tráth ach nach bhfuil anois," a dúirt sé.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
reference: De réir na comhairle a thug Dr. Ehud Ur, ollamh le leigheas in Ollscoil Dalhousie in Halifax, an Albain Nua agus cathaoirleach ar rannán cliniciúil agus eolaíochta de Chomhlachas Diaibéitis Cheanada, níl ach tús curtha leis an taighde fós.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
reference: Cosúil le roinnt saineolaithe eile, tá amhras air cibé an féidir diaibéiteas a leigheas, ag tabhairt faoi deara nach bhfuil baint ar bith ag na torthaí seo le daoine le diaibéiteas cineál 1 acu cheana féin.

source: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
reference: Dé Luain, d’fhógair Sara Danius, rúnaí buan Choiste Litríochta Nobel in Acadamh na Sualainne, go poiblí le linn clár raidió ar Sveriges Radio sa tSualainn, go raibh an coiste, nach raibh in ann teagmháil dhíreach a dhéanamh le Bob Dylan faoi Dhuais Nobel sa Litríocht 2016 a bhuachan. tar éis éirí as a chuid iarrachtaí chun teacht air.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
reference: Dúirt Danius, "Níl muid ag déanamh dada faoi láthair. Chuir mé glao ar a chomrádaí is dlúithe leis agus sheol mé ríomhphoist chuig an duine sin agus fuair mé freagairt an-chairdiúl dá réir. Is leor é sin cinnte faoin am seo."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
reference: Roimhe seo, dúirt Príomhfheidhmeannach Ring, Jamie Siminoff, gur thosaigh an chuideachta as smaoineamh a bhuail é nuair nár fhéad sé clog a dhorais a chloisteáil óna shiopa ina gharáiste.

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
reference: Thóg sé cloigín dorais WiFi, a dúirt sé.

source: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
reference: Dúirt Siminoff gur tháinig borradh faoi dhíolacháin tar éis dó a bheith le feiceáil in 2013 in eipeasóid de Shark Tank inar dhiúltaigh painéal an tseó an chuideachta nua a mhaoiniú.

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
reference: Go déanach in 2017, bhí Siminoff le feiceáil ar an gcainéal teilifíse siopadóireachta QVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
reference: Shocraigh Ring cás dlí chomh maith leis an gcuideachta slándála, Corparáid ADT, a bhí in iomaíocht leis.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
reference: Cé gur cosúil go bhfuil vacsaín turgnamhach amháin in ann básmhaireacht Ebola a laghdú, go dtí seo, níor léiríodh go soiléir go raibh aon druga oiriúnach chun ionfhabhtú atá ann cheana a chóireáil.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
reference: Léirigh ZMapp, manglam antashubstainte amháin, féidearthachtaí sa réimse ar an gcéad dul síos, ach léirigh staidéir fhoirmiúla go raibh níos lú tairbhe leis ná mar a theastaigh chun an bás a chosc.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
reference: Sa triail PALM, úsáideadh ZMapp mar rialú, rud a chiallaíonn gur úsáid eolaithe é mar bhunlíne agus rinne siad comparáid idir na trí chóireáil eile leis.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
reference: Tacaíonn USA Gymnastics le litir Choiste Oilimpeach na Stát Aontaithe agus glacann sé leis go bhfuil sé riachtanach amach is amach go gcuirfeadh an teaghlach Oilimpeach timpeallacht shábháilte chun cinn dár lúthchleasaithe uile.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
reference: Aontaímid le ráiteas an USOC go mb’fhéidir gurbh fhearr an freastal a dhéanfaí ar leasanna ár lúthchleasaithe agus ár gclubanna, agus a spórt, trí bhogadh ar aghaidh le hathrú bríoch laistigh dár n-eagraíocht, seachas le dídheimhniú.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
reference: Tacaíonn USA Gymnastics le himscrúdú neamhspleách a d’fhéadfadh léargas a thabhairt ar an gcaoi a bhféadfadh mí-úsáid den mhéid a thuairiscigh daoine a tháinig slán ó Larry Nassar a bheith gan bhraith chomh fada sin agus trína nglacfaí le cibé athruithe is gá.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
reference: Tá an aidhm chéanna ag Gleacaíocht SAM agus an USOC — spórt na gleacaíochta, agus cineálacha eile spóirt, a dhéanamh chomh sábháilte agus is féidir ionas gur féidir le lúthchleasaithe a n-aisling a chomhlíonadh i dtimpeallacht shábháilte, dhearfach agus chumhachtaithe.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
reference: I gcaitheamh na 1960idí, d’oibrigh Brzezinski mar chomhairleoir do John F. Kennedy agus ansin do rialtas Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
reference: Le linn na roghnúchán i 1976 chuir sé comhairle ar Carter faoi pholasaí eachtrach, agus bhí sé ina Chomhairleoir Slándála Náisiúnta (NSA) ansin ó 1977 go dtí 1981, ag teacht i gcomharba ar Henry Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Mar Chomhairleoir Slándála Náisiúnta, chuidigh sé le Carter cursaí an tsaoil a láimhseáil go cáiréiseach, amhail Comhaontuithe Camp David i 1978; caidrimh SAM-an tSin a shocrú go normálta ar feadh blianta deiridh na 1970idí; Réabhlóid na hIaráine as a d'eascair géarchéim na ngiall in Iaráin i 1979; agus ionradh na Sóivéadach ar an Afganastáin i 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
reference: Fuair ​​an scannán, ina bhfuil príomhpháirteanna ag Ryan Gosling agus Emma Stone, ainmniúcháin i ngach mórchatagóir.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
reference: Fuair Gosling agus Stone ainmniúcháin don Aisteoir is fearr agus don Bhanaisteoir is fearr faoi seach.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
reference: I measc na n-ainmniúchán eile tá an Pictiúr is fearr, 'chomh maith leis an' Stiúrthóir, Cineamatagrafaíocht, Dearadh Feistis, Eagarthóireacht Scannán, Scór Bunaidh, Dearadh Léiriúcháin, Eagarthóireacht Fuaime, Meascadh Fuaime agus Script Scannáin Bhunaidh 'is fearr'.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
reference: Fuair ​​dhá amhrán ón scannán, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) agus City of Stars, ainmniúcháin don amhrán bunaidh is fearr. Fuair ​​stiúideo Lionsgate 26 ainmniúchán — níos mó ná aon stiúideo eile.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
reference: D'fhógair Donald Trump go mall ar an Domhnach, i ráiteas a d'eisigh sé trína phreasrúnaí, go mbeadh trúpaí Meiriceánacha ag fágáil an tSiria.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: Rinneadh an fógra tar éis do Trump comhrá fóin a bheith aige le Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, Príomh-Aire na Tuirce.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
reference: Ghabhfadh an Tuirc uirthi féin an cúram as trodaithe gafa de chuid ISIS a ghardáil, a dhiúltaigh náisiúin na hEorpa a chur ar ais chuig a dtíortha féin, a dúirt an ráiteas.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
reference: Ní amháin go ndeimhníonn sé seo go raibh cleití ar dhineasáir áirithe ar a laghad, teoiric atá forleathan cheana féin, ach soláthraíonn sé mionsonraí nach bhfaightear go hiondúil ó iontaisí, ar nós dath agus leagan amach tríthoiseach.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
reference: . Deir eolaithe go raibh dath crón ar chlúmh an ainmhí seo ar barr agus dath meathbhán nó caraitéanóideach istigh faoi.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
reference: Tugann an fhionnachtain léargas dúinn ar éabhlóid na gcleití sna héin.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
reference: Toisc nach bhfuil gas (ar a dtugtar rachis) dea-fhorbartha i gcleití an dineasáir, ach go mbíonn tréithe eile cleite iontu — bairb agus bairbíní — tuigeadh don taighdeoirí gur dócha go mba chéim éabhlóideach níos deireanaí í an rachis ná na tréithe eile sin.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: Tugann struchtúr na gcleití le tuiscint nár úsáideadh iad le linn eitilte ach chun teocht a rialú nó taispeántas a thabhairt. Mhol na taighdeoirí, cé gur eireaball dineasáir óig é seo, go léiríonn an sampla clúmh an éin fhásta agus ní clúmh an tsicín.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: Mhol na taighdeoirí, cé gur eireaball ó dhineasár óg é seo, go léiríonn an sampla cluimhreach an éin fhásta agus ní clúmh mín an éin óig.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
reference: Maraíodh beirt phóilíní agus gortaíodh breis agus fiche duine eile nuair a phléasc buama cairr ag ceannáras póilíní in Gaziantep, an Tuirc maidin inné.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
reference: Dúirt oifig an ghobharnóra gur póilíní a bhí i naonúr déag díobh sin a gortaíodh.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
reference: Dúirt na póilíní gur dóigh leo gur míleatach a líomhnaítear a bhain le Daesh (ISIL) a bhí freagrach as an ionsaí.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
reference: Fuair ​​siad amach gur oibrigh an Ghrian ar na bunphrionsabail chéanna le réaltaí eile: Fuarthas amach go raibh gníomhaíocht na réaltaí uile sa chóras á tiomáint ag a lonrachas, a rothlú, agus ní ag aon rud eile.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
reference: Baintear úsáid as an lonracht agus an rothlú in éineacht chun uimhir Rossby réalta a chinneadh, uimhir atá gaolmhar le sreabhadh plasma.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
reference: Dá lú an uimhir Rossby, is ea is neamhghníomhaí an réalta ó thaobh athruithe maighnéadacha.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
reference: Le linn a thurais, chuaigh rudaí in aimhréidh ar Iwasaki go mion minic.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
reference: Robáladh foghlaithe mara é, ionsaíodh madra confach é i dTibéid, éalaíodh ó phósadh é i Neipeal agus gabhadh é in India.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
reference: Oibríonn caighdeán 802.11n ar mhinicíochtaí 2.4Ghz agus 5.0Ghz araon.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
reference: Cuirfidh sé seo ar a chumas a bheith comhoiriúnach go siarghabhálach le 802.11a, 802.11b agus 802.11g, ar choinníoll go bhfuil dé-raidiónna ag an mbunstáisiún.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
reference: Tá na luais 802.11n i bhfad níos tapa ná luais a réamhtheachtaithe agus tá tréchur teoiriciúil uasta de600M ghiotán sa soicind acu.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
reference: Ní dheachaigh Duvall, agus é pósta le beirt leanaí fásta, go mór i bhfeidhm ar Miller, ar insíodh an scéal dó.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
reference: Nuair a iarradh air trácht a dhéanamh, dúirt Miller, "Déanann Mike cuid mhaith cainte le linn na héisteachta...Bhí mé dom' ullmhú féin mar sin ní raibh an méid a bhí á rá aige á chloisteáil agam i ndáiríre."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
reference: "Déanfaimid ár ndícheall astaíochtaí dé-ocsaíd charbóin in aghaidh an aonaid OTI a ghearradh de chorrlach suntasach faoi 2020 ó leibhéal 2005," "a dúirt Hu.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
reference: Níor shocraigh sé figiúr do na giorrúcháin, á rá go ndéanfar iad bunaithe ar aschur geilleagrach na Síne.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
reference: Spreag Hu tíortha i mbéal forbartha "chun an seanchosán de bheith ag truailliú ar dtús agus glanadh suas níos déanaí a sheachaint."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
reference: Dúirt sé freisin "nár chóir iallach a chur orthu, áfach, oibleagáidí a ghlacadh a sháraíonn a gcéim forbartha, a bhfreagracht agus a gcumas."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
reference: Chuir Grúpa Staidéir na hIaráice a thuarascáil i láthair ar a 12.00 GMT inniu.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
reference: Tugann sé rabhadh nach féidir le duine ar bith dearbhú go stopfaidh gníomh ar bith cogaíocht sheicteach, foréigean atá ag méadú nó titim isteach ina chíor thuathail.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
reference: Is é an chéad rud sa Tuarascáil agóid ar son díospóireacht oscailte agus comhthoil a bhaint amach sna Stáit Aontaithe ar an mbeartas i leith an Mheánoirthir.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
reference: Sa tuarascáil, cáintear gach gné, nach mór, de bheartas reatha na Feidhmeannachta i leith na hIaráice agus moltar athrú treo ar an bpointe boise.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
reference: Ar bharr liosta na 78 moladh atá ann is ea go nglacfar le tionscnaimh nua taidhleoireachta roimh dheireadh na bliana seo chun teorainneacha na hIaráice a choinneáil slán ó idirghabháil naimhdeach agus chun caidreamh taidhleoireachta a athbhunú lena comharsan.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
reference: D'fhógair Céadbhean na hAirgintíne Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner go mbeadh sí ina hiarrthóir sa toghchán uachtaránachta, tugadh a ráiteas in La Plata, cathair atá 50 ciliméadar (31 míle) ar shiúl ó Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
reference: D'fhógair Mrs. Kirchner go raibh rún sé de rún aici rith don uachtaránacht ag an Argentine Theatre, an láthair chéanna a d'úsáid sí lena feachtas 2005 don Seanad mar bhall den toscaireacht chúige Buenos Aires a thosú.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
reference: Conspóid faoi chaiteachas ar oibreacha faoisimh agus atógála tar éis Hairicín Katrina a spreag an díospóireacht; díospóireacht ar thug coimeádaigh fioscacha áirithe "Bush's New Orleans Deal" uirthi chun greann a bhaint aisti.

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
reference: Tá cáineadh liobrálach ar na hiarrachtaí atógála dírithe ar bhronnadh conarthaí atógála ar dhream a mheastar a bheith ar an taobh istigh i Washington.

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
reference: Chuaigh os cionn ceithre mhilliún duine chun na Róimhe chun freastal ar an tsochraid.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
reference: Bhí líon na ndaoine a bhí i láthair chomh mór sin nárbh fhéidir le gach duine a slí a dhéanamh chuig an sochraid i gCearnóg Pheadair.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
reference: Suiteáladh roinnt scáileáin mhóra teilifíse in áiteanna éagsúla sa Róimh chun go bhféadfadh na daoine féachaint ar an searmanas.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
reference: I gcuid mhór cathracha eile san Iodáil agus sa chuid eile den domhan, go háirithe sa Pholainn, rinneadh socruithe den chineál céanna, agus bhreathnaigh líon mór daoine orthu.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
reference: Tá iar-pholasaithe an FBI cáinte ag staraí mar gheall ar acmhainní a chur isteach i gcásanna a mbeadh éasca le réiteach, go háirithe cásanna faoi charranna goidte, agus de thoradh air seo ná an ráta ratha a ardú.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
reference: Chuir an Chomhdháil tús le maoiniú ar an dtionscnamh graostachta sa bhliain fhioscach 2005 agus sonraíodh nár mhór don FBI 10 ghníomhaire a shannadh chun déileáil le pornagrafaíocht do dhaoine fásta.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
reference: Ba é Robin Uthappa a bhain an scór is airde sa dreas, 70 rith in díreach 41 liathróid trí 11 cheathair agus 2 shé a bhualadh.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
reference: D'imir slacaí láir, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, go maith agus ghnóthaigh siad céad rith eatarthu.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
reference: Ach, tar éis di babhta slactha an chaptaen a chailleadh ní dhearna an India ach 36 rith agus chaill 7 mbabhta slactha chun deireadh a chur leis an dreas istigh.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
reference: Tháinig George W. Bush, Uachtarán na Stát Aontaithe, go Singeapór maidin an 16 Samhain, ag cur tús le turas seachtaine timpeall na hÁise.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: Bheannaigh an leas-Phríomh Aire Shingeapór Wong Kan Seng dó agus pléadh gnéithe trádála agus sceimhlitheoireachta le Príomh Aire Shingeapór Lee Hsien Loong.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
reference: Tar éis seachtaine de chailliúintí sa toghchán meántéarma, labhair Bush le lucht féachana faoin mborradh trádála leis an Áise.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
reference: D'aontaigh an Príomh-Aire Stephen Harper 'Acht Aeir Ghlan' an rialtais a chur chuig coiste uile-pháirtí lena athbhreithniú, roimh an dara léamh, tar éis cruinniú 25 nóiméad Dé Máirt le Jack Layton, ceannaire an NDP, ag an PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
reference: D'iarr Layton athruithe ar bhille timpeallachta an Pháirtí Chaomhaigh i rith an chruinniú leis an PM, ag cuardach "athscríobh cuimsitheach agus iomlán" ar bhille timpeallachta an Pháirtí Chaomhaigh.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
reference: Ón uair a bhí maoiniú don ospidéal Mersey, in Devonport, an Tasmáin tógtha i gceannas ag an Rialtas Feidearálach, tá an gníomh sin á cháineadh ag an rialtas stáit agus ag roinnt feisirí feidearálacha mar chleasaíocht roimh an toghchán feidearálach atá le fógairt faoi mhí na Samhna.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
reference: Ach dúirt an Príomh-Aire John Howard nach raibh ann sa ghníomh, AUD$45 milliún sa bhreis a thabhairt, ach chun áiseanna an ospidéil a chosaint in aghaidh a bheith íosghrádaithe ag rialtas na Tasmáine.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
reference: Sa nuacht is déanaí, léirigh léamha ar leibhéil na farraige go raibh tsunami ginte. Taifeadadh roinnt gníomhaíochta cinnte maidir le tsunami gar do Pago Pago agus Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
reference: Níor tuairiscíodh aon damáiste nó gortuithe móra i dTonga, ach cailleadh an chumhacht go sealadach, rud a deirtear a chiallaigh nach bhfuair údaráis Thonga an rabhadh súnámaí a d’eisigh an PTWC.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
reference: Bhí ceithre scoil déag suite cois cósta, nó gar don chósta, i Haváí dúnta ar feadh an lae Dé Céadaoin in ainneoin go raibh deireadh curtha leis na rabhaidh.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
reference: D'fháiltigh George W. Bush, Uachtarán na Stát Aontaithe, roimh an fhógra.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
reference: Is é a thug urlabhraí Bush, Gordon Johndroe, ar ghealltanas na Cóiré Thuaidh ná "céim mhór i dtreo na sprice le dí-armáil núicléach infhíoraithe de leithinis na Cóiré a bhaint amach."

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
reference: Tháinig ann do Stoirm Fothrópaiceach Jerry, an deichiú stoirm ainmnithe de shéasúr Hairicín an Atlantaigh, san Aigéan Atlantach inniu.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
reference: Deir an tIonad Náisiúnta Hairicín (NHC) nach aon bhagairt don talamh é Jerry ag an bpointe seo.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
reference: Mheas Cór Innealtóirí na S.A. go bhféadfadh 6 orlach fearthainne na léibhéanna a bhí damáistithe cheana féin a bhearnú.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
reference: Tá an Naoú Barda, ina raibh tuilte chomh hard le 20 troigh le linn Hairicín Katrina, faoi uisce faoi láthair suas go coim de bhrí go raibh an t-uisce tar éis teacht thar bharr leibhé in aice láimhe.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
reference: Tá uisce ag doirteadh thar an leibhé i rannán atá 100 troigh ar leithead.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
reference: Chuir Adam Cuerden, Riarthóir Commons, a chuid frustrachais in iúl maidir leis na comhaid scriosta nuair a labhair sé le Wikinews an mhí seo caite.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
reference: "D'inis sé [Wales] bréag dúinn ón tús. An chéad uair, ag ligean air gur bhain sé le cúiseanna dlí. An dara huair, ag ligean air go raibh sé ag éisteacht, go dtí go raibh an ealaín scriosta aige."

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
reference: Ba é míshásamh an phobail a spreag na hiarrachtaí reatha chun beartas ar ábhar gnéasach a dhréachtú don suíomh ar a n-óstáiltear na milliún meán a bhfuil ceadúnas oscailte acu.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Obair theoiriciúil ba mhó a rinneadh, ach scríobhadh an clár chun breathnóireachtaí a rinneadh ar réaltchóras Sagittarius a ionsamhlú.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
reference: Fórsaí taoide idir ábhar dorcha an réaltra agus ábhar dorcha Bhealach na Bó Finne a chruthódh an éifeacht a bhí á lorg ag an bhfoireann.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Díreach mar a bhíonn tarraingt ag an ghealach ar an domhan, rud a chruthaíonn taoidí, bíonn Bealach na Bó Finne ag dul i bhfeidhm ar réaltra an tSaighdeora.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
reference: Bhí ar chumas na n-eolaithe teacht ar an tuairim go mbíonn tionchar ag an ábhar dorcha ar ábhar dorcha eile, díreach mar a bhíonn ag gnáthábhar.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
reference: Deir an teoiric seo go bhfuil an chuid is mó den ábhar dorcha thart ar réaltra suite timpeall ar réaltra i gcineál fáinne, agus go bhfuil sé déanta as go leor cáithníní beaga.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
reference: Taispeánann tuairiscí teilifíse deatach bán ag teacht as an bplanda.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
reference: Tá údaráis áitiúla ag tabhairt foláireamh do dhaoine atá ina gcónaí thart ar an mhonarcha fanacht taobh istigh, aerchóiritheoirí a mhúchadh agus gan uisce as an sconna a ól.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
reference: De réir ghníomhaireacht núicléach na Seapáine, rinneadh sainaithint ar chaeisiam agus iaidín radaighníomhach ag an ngléasra.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
reference: Tá na húdaráis den tuairim gur comhartha é sin b'fhéidir go bhfuil na coimeádáin ina mbíonn breosla úráiniam ag an suíomh tar éis briseadh agus go bhfuil siad ag sceitheadh.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Ba é Dr. Tony Moll a fuair amach faoin Eitinn Rí-Fhrithsheasmhach in aghaidh Drugaí (XDR-TB) sa réigiún KwaZulu-Natal san Afraic Theas.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
reference: In agallamh, dúirt sé go raibh an t-athraitheach nua "an-trioblóideach agus scanrúil mar gheall ar an ráta básanna an-ard."

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
reference: B’fhéidir go ndearna othair áirithe an frídín a tholg san ospidéal, dar leis an Dr. Moll, agus ba oibrithe sláinte ospidéil beirt ar a laghad.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
reference: I gceann bliana, féadfaidh duine atá ionfhabhtaithe 10 go 15 dlúth-theagmháil eile a ionfhabhtú.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
reference: Mar sin féin, is cosúil go bhfuil an céatadán XDR-TB sa ghrúpa iomlán daoine a bhfuil eitinn orthu fós íseal; 6,000 den 330,000 duine iomlán ionfhabhtaithe ag aon am amháin áirithe san Afraic Theas.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
reference: Bhuail na satailítí, a raibh os cionn 1,000 punt meáchain i ngach ceann díobh, agus a bhí ag taisteal ag thart ar 17,500 míle san uair, faoina chéile 491 mhíle os cionn an Domhain.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
reference: Deir eolaithe gur pléascadh ollmhór is ea a lean an tuairt.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
reference: Tá siad fós ag iarraidh a dhéanamh amach díreach chomh mór is a bhí an tuairteáil agus cén tionchar a bheidh aige ar an Domhan.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
reference: Tá an smionagar á rianú ag Ceannasaíocht Straitéiseach na Stát Aontaithe in oifig Roinn Cosanta S.A..

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
reference: Déanfar toradh na hanailíse breactha a phostáil ar shuíomh gréasáin poiblí.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
reference: Cuirfear trom-dhúnmharú i leith dochtúra a bhí fostaithe san Ospidéal Leanaí i bPittsburgh, Pennsylvania, nuair a aimsíodh a máthair básaithe i mbúit a cairr Dé Céadaoin, a deir na údaráis in Ohio.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
reference: In Blue Ash, Ohio, bruachbhaile atá thart 15 míle ó thuaidh ar Cincinnati, thángthas ar Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, a bhí ina luí ar an talamh in aice leis an mbóthar, gan ach T-léine agus fo-éadaí air agus an chosúlacht ann go raibh sé go mór faoi thionchar leighis.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
reference: Threoraigh sí na hoifigigh chuig a Oldsmobile Intrigue dubh, a bhí 500 troigh uathu.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
reference: Ansin, tháinig siad ar chorp Saroja Balasubramanian, a bhí 53 bliain d'aois, faoi chlúdach blaincéad a raibh smáil fola orthu.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
reference: Dúirt na póilíní gur cosúil go raibh an corp ann ar feadh lá amháin nó mar sin.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
reference: Go déanach i mí Iúil a tuairiscíodh na chéad chásanna den ghalar an séasúr seo.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
reference: Muca a iompraíonn an galar, agus is iad muiscítí a aistríonn as sin go daoine é.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
reference: Tá an ráig tar éis rialtas na hIndia a spreagadh chun bearta áirithe a dhéanamh amhail gabhálaithe muc a chur ag obair i gceantair atá buailte go dona, na mílte cuirtíní muiscíte a dháileadh agus lotnaidicídí a spraeáil.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
reference: Gheall an rialtas na milliúin fial de vacsaín in aghaidh an einceifealaítis, chomh maith, rud a chabhróidh le gníomhaireachtaí sláinte ullmhú don bhliain seo chugainn.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
reference: Cuireadh moill ar phleananna chun vacsaíní a sheachadadh i mbliana chuig na ceantair is mó atá thíos leis go stairiúil mar gheall ar easpa cistí agus tosaíocht íseal i gcomparáid le galair eile.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
reference: In 1956 bhog Słania go dtí an tSualainn, agus trí bliana ina dhiaidh sin thosaigh sé ag obair in Oifig Poist na Sualainne agus rinneadh príomh-ghreanadóir di.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
reference: Shaothraigh sé breis agus 1,000 stampa don tSualainn agus do 28 tír eile.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
reference: Tá an oiread sin de cháilíocht agus mionghnéithe ina chuid saothar gurbh é duine de na bailitheoirí stampaí "is mó aithne aige ar na saolta seo". Bíonn cuid acu ag bailiú a chuid saothar amháin.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
reference: An míliú stampa a rinne sé ná an ceann iontach "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" le David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, a liostaíodh sa Leabhar Guinness de Churiarrachtaí Domhanda.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
reference: Bhí sé i mbun nótaí bainc a ghreanadh ar son iliomad tíortha, samplaí le déanaí dá chuid oibre ná na portráidí an phríomh-aire atá chun tosaigh ar na nótaí nua $5 agus $100 i gCeanada.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
reference: Tar éis na timpiste, tugadh Gibson chuig ospidéal ach fuair sé bás tamall gearr ina dhiaidh sin.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
reference: Níor gortaíodh tiománaí na trucaile, atá 64 bliain d'aois, sa tuairteáil.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
reference: Tógadh an fheithicil féin ar shiúl ó láthair na timpiste ag tuairim agus 1200 GMT ar an lá céanna.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
reference: De réir duine a bhí ag obair i ngaráiste gar don áit inar tharla an timpiste: "Bhí leanaí ag fanacht le dul trasna an bhóthair agus bhí siad uile ag screadach agus ag gol."

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
reference: Rith siad go léir siar ón áit ar tharla an timpiste.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
reference: I measc na n-ábhar eile atá ar an gclár oibre in Bali tá na foraoisí atá fágtha ar domhan a shábháil, agus teicneolaíochtaí a chomhroinnt chun cabhrú le náisiúin i mbéal forbartha fás ar bhealaí a laghdaíonn an truailliú.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
reference: Tá súil ag na N.A. ciste a chur i gcrích chun cabhrú le tíortha atá thíos leis an téamh domhanda déileáil lena iarmhairtí.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
reference: D'fhéadfaí an t-airgead a chaitheamh ar thithe a dhéanamh imdhíonach ar thuilte, ar bhainistíocht níos fearr ar uisce agus ar éagsúlú barr.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
reference: Scríobh Fluke go raibh roinnt daoine ag iarraidh guth na mban a bhí ag labhairt amach faoi shláinte na mban a mhúchadh ach nár éirigh leo.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
reference: Bhain sí an chiall sin as ar deireadh i ngeall ar an iliomad tráchtaí dearfacha agus an spreagadh a fuair sí ó mhná agus ó fhir ag áiteamh go bhféachfaí ar réim cógas frithghiniúna mar riachtanas míochaine.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
reference: Nuair a tháinig deireadh leis an troid agus tar éis na daoine gonta a iompar chuig an ospidéal, d’fhan thart ar 40 de na háitritheoirí eile sa chlós agus dhiúltaigh siad filleadh ar a gcillíní.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
reference: Rinne idirbheartaithe iarracht an scéal a chur ina cheart, ach níl éilimh na bpríosúnach soiléir.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
reference: Idir 10:00-11:00 i.n. MDT, lasadh tine sa chlós ag na príosúnaigh.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
reference: Níorbh fhada go ndeachaigh oifigigh i bhfeisteas círéibe isteach sa chlós agus úsáideadh deorghás lena raibh ann a theanntú.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
reference: Ar dheireadh thiar mhúch na foirne dóiteáin an tine faoi 11:35 i.n.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
reference: Nuair a tógadh an damba i 1963, cuireadh stop leis na tuile shéasúracha a scaipidís dríodar ar fud na habhann.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
reference: Bhí an dríodar seo riachtanach chun barraí gainimh agus tránna a chruthú, a d'fheidhmigh mar ghnáthóga fiadhúlra.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
reference: Dá bharr sin, tá dhá speiceas d'éisc atá díofa anois, agus dhá cheann eile atá i mbaol, an plobán dronnach san áireamh.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
reference: Cé nach n-ardófar an uisceleibhéal ach cúpla troith tar éis na tuile, tá oifigigh ag súil go mba leor é sin chun na guairí creimthe i dtreo bhéal na habhann a aischur.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
reference: Níor eisíodh aon rabhadh súnámaí, agus de réir ghníomhaireacht geoifisice Iacárta, ní eiseofar aon rabhadh súnamaí toisc nár chomhlíon an crith talún an riachtanas maidir le méid 6.5.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
reference: Ainneoin nach raibh aon bhagairt súnámaí ann, tháinig scaoll ar chónaitheoirí agus thosaigh siad ag fágáil a ngnóthaí agus a dtíthe.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
reference: Cé go raibh na deora i súile Winfrey agus í ag fágáil slán, léirigh sé go soiléir dá lucht leanúna go mbeidh sí ar ais.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
reference: "Ní ag fágáil slán atáimid anseo. Tá caibidil amháin á dúnadh agus ceann nua á hoscailt."

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
reference: Léirigh na torthaí deiridh ó thoghcháin na huachtaránachta agus parlaiminte sa Namaib gur atoghadh an t-uachtarán in oifig, Hifikepunye Pohamba, le farasbarr suntasach.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
reference: Choimeád an páirtí rialaithe, Eagraíocht Phobail Iardheisceart na hAfraice (SWAPO), tromlach sna toghcháin pharlaiminteacha, leis.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
reference: Chuaigh trúpaí comhfhórsa agus Afganastánacha isteach sa cheantar leis an suíomh a choinneáil slán agus cuireadh aerárthaí eile comhfhórsa isteach ann le cabhair a thabhairt.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
reference: Go hard ar thalamh sléibhtiúil a tháinig an tuairteáil, agus creidtear gur lámhach an namhad a ba chúis leis.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
reference: Tá drochaimsir agus talamh garbh ag cur isteach ar iarrachtaí le suíomh na timpiste a chuardach.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
reference: Deir an carthanas míochaine Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres agus an Eagraíocht Dhomhanda Sláinte go bhfuil sé ar an ráig is measa a taifeadadh sa tír.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
reference: Dúirt Urlabhraí Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman: "Tá an ráig is measa riamh ag teannadh le hAngóla agus tá an scéal an-dona ann i gcónaí," a dúirt sé.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
reference: Cuireadh tús leis na cluichí ag 10:00 am in aimsir bhreá agus seachas ceobhrán i lár na maidine a ghlan go tapa, ba togha lá é do rugbaí 7 mbliana.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
reference: Thosaigh An Afraic Theas, an fhoireann ab fhearr seans, go seoighe nuair a bhuaigh siad go compordach 26 - 00 ar an tSaimbia a raibh an cúigiú seans ab fhearr acu.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
reference: Cé go raibh cuma mheirgeach orthu sa chluiche i ndiaidh a leathbhádhóirí deisceartacha, tháinig feabhas ar an Afraic Theas de réir a chéile mar a lean an comórtas ar aghaidh.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
reference: Tharraing siad aird orthu féin as a gcosaint eagraithe, a scileanna láimhseála liathróide agus a scothobair bhuíne agus ba shoiléir gurb iad seo an fhoireann a bhí le ceansú.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
reference: Deir oifigigh do chathair Amstardam agus do Mhúsaem Anne Frank go bhfuil an crann ionfhabhtaithe le fungas agus go gcuireann sé an pobal i gcontúirt de bhrí go maíonn siad go raibh sé i mbaol titime.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
reference: Sceidealaíodh é le leagadh ar an Mháirt ach sábháladh é i ndiaidh rialú cúirte éigeandála.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
reference: Tá bealaí isteach uile na bpluaiseanna, ar tugadh "The Seven Sisters" orthu, ar a laghad 100 go 250 méadar (328 go 820 troith) ar trastomhas.

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
reference: Taispeánann íomhánna infridhearg go léiríonn na hathruithe teochta ón oíche agus ón lá gurb ionann agus phluais iad.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
reference: Bíonn siad níos fionnuaire ná an dromchla timpeall orthu de ló agus níos teo istoíche.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: Níl a n-iompraíocht theirmeach chomh seasmhach agus atá pluaiseanna móra ar an Domhan a choinníonn teocht measartha seasmhach go minic, ach tá sé ag teacht leis gur poill dhomhain sa talamh iad," a dúirt Glen Cushing ó Fhoireann Réaltgheolaíochta Shuirbhé Geolaíochta na Stát Aontaithe agus Ollscoil Arizona Thuaidh atá suite in Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
reference: Sa Fhrainc, ba eispéireas ísealteicneolaíochta go traidisiúnta a bhí sa vótáil: scair na vótálaithe iad féin sa bhoth, cuirtear bileog páipéir réamhphriontáilte leis an iarrthóir is rogha leo curtha in iúl ann i gclúdach litreach.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
reference: Tar éis do na hoifigigh aitheantas an vótálaí a fhíorú, cuireann an vótálaí an clúdach litreach isteach sa bhosca ballóide agus síníonn sé/sí an rolla vótála.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
reference: Le dlí toghcháin na Fraince déantar na nósanna imeachta a chódú ar bhealach sách dian.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
reference: Ó 1988, caithfidh boscaí ballóide a bheith trédhearcach ionas gur féidir le vótálaithe agus breathnóirí a fheiceáil nach bhfuil aon chlúdach litreach ann ag tús na vótála agus nár cuireadh aon chlúdach litreach leis ach amháin iad siúd a bhain le vótálaithe cuí-áirithe agus cuí-údaraithe.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
reference: Is féidir le hiarrthóirí a gcuid ionadaithe a chur ann chun gach cuid den phróiseas a dhearbhú. Um thráthnóna, comhairtear vótaí ag foireann dheonach faoi dhian-mhaoirseacht, agus de réir nósanna imeachta sonracha.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
reference: Bhí an ASUS Eee PC, ar lainseáladh go domhanda níos luaithe é ar chúinsí costais agus feidhmíochta, ina ábhar mór cainte ag an ócáid Taipei IT Month in 2007.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
reference: Ach beidh an margadh tomhaltais do ríomhairí glúine difriúil agus athraithe ó bhonn tar éis do ASUS gradam a fháil ó Feidhmeannach Yuan de chuid Poblacht na Síne i nGradam Inbhuanaithe 2007 na Téaváine.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
reference: Tugtar "amharclann raidió ar an seanstíl ar tugadh casadh nua scannalach geocaigh dó!" ar an seó ar láithreán gréasáin an stáisiúin.

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
reference: Sna laethanta tosaigh, bhí an seó le feiceáil go hiomlán ar an suíomh raidió ar líne seanbhunaithe TogiNet Radio, suíomh a dhírigh ar chláir cainte raidió.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
reference: Go déanach in 2015, bhunaigh TogiNet AstroNet Radio mar stáisiún fochuideachta.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
reference: Ar dtús is aisteoirí amaitéaracha gutha ó oirthear Texas a bhí sa seó.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
reference: Tuairiscíodh gur lean creachadóireacht ar aghaidh go forleathan thar oíche, toisc nach raibh oifigigh forfheidhmithe dlí i láthair ar shráideanna Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
reference: De réir chuntais ó bhreathnóir amháin bhí Bishkek ag titim i staid "ainrialachais", mar a bhí dronga de dhaoine ag guairdeall thart ar na sráide agus ag creachadh siopaí d'earraí tomhaltais.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
reference: Ar agóideoirí ón deisceart a chuir roinnt cónaitheoirí in Bishkek an milleán as an aindlí.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: Tá an Afraic Theas tar éis an bua a fháil ar na All Blacks (An Nua-Shéalainn) i gcluiche rugbaí Trí Náisiún ag Staid Ríoga Bafokeng in Rustenburg, an Afraic Theas.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
reference: Bua de phointe amháin a bhí sa scór deiridh, 21 in aghaidh 20, rud a chuir deireadh le sraith 15 bhua na All Blacks.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
reference: Do na Springboks, ba é sin deireadh le sraith cailliúintí de chúig chluiche as a chéile.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
reference: Ba é an cluiche deireanach do na All Blacks, ag a raibh an trófaí bainte cheana féin acu coicís ó shin.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
reference: Beidh cluiche ceannais na sraithe ar siúl i bPáirc Ellis in Johannesburg an tseachtain seo chugainn, nuair a imreoidh na Springboks in aghaidh na hAstráile.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
reference: Bhuail crith talún measartha iarthar Montana ag 10:08 i.n. Dé Luain.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
reference: Ní bhfuair Suirbhéireacht Gheolaíochta na Stát Aontaithe (USGS) ná ​​a Lárionad Náisiúnta Faisnéise Crith Talún aon tuairiscí láithreach ar dhamáiste.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
reference: Bhí lár an chreatha talún timpeall 20 km (15 mhíle) ó thuaidh soir ó thuaidh de Dillon, agus timpeall 65 km (40 míle) ó dheas de Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
reference: Deimhníodh gur ionfhabhtaigh H5N1, an tréithchineál de fhliú na n-éan atá marfach don duine, lacha fhiáin mharbh a fuarthas Dé Luain i dtalamh riascach láimh le Lyon in oirthear na Fraince.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
reference: Tá an Fhrainc ar an seachtú tír san Aontas Eorpach atá buailte leis an víreas seo, í ag teacht i ndiaidh; an Ostair, an Ghearmáin, an tSlóivéin, an Bhulgáir, an Ghréig agus an Iodáil.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
reference: Níor deimhníodh fós cásanna amhrasta den H5N1 a fuarthas sa Chróit agus sa Danmhairg.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
reference: Rinne Chambers agra ar Dhia mar gheall ar "bás, scriosadh agus sceimhliú fairsing ar na milliúin agus na milliúin daoine ar Domhan."

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
reference: Áitíonn Chambers, arb agnóisí é, gur cás "baoth" atá ina chás dlí agus gur féidir le "duine ar bith cás a thabhairt in éadan duine ar bith."

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
reference: Scéal ealaíontóra "arb é dúil i ndrugaí agus sa tSeapáin a rialaíonn a shaol" atá sa cheoldráma Francach le Camille Saint-Saens.

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
reference: Dá réir sin, caitheann na taibheoirí toitíní cannabais ar stáitse, agus is é an téatar féin a mholann don lucht féachana déanamh amhlaidh.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
reference: Tháinig Iar-Cheann Comhairle Newt Gingrich, Gobharnóir Texas Rick Perry, agus Banfheisire Michele Bachmann sa cheathrú, sa chúigiú agus sa séú háit faoi seach.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
reference: Nuair a tháinig na torthaí isteach, mhol Gingrich Santorum ach bhí focail ghéara aige do Romney, an fear taobh thiar den fheachtas diúltach fógraíochta a scaipeadh in Iowa i gcoinne Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
reference: Dúirt Perry go "bhfillfeadh sé ar Texas chun torthaí chácas na hoíche anocht a mheas, féachaint an bhfuil bealach chun cinn dom sa rás seo", ach dúirt sé ina dhiaidh sin go bhfanfadh sé sa rás agus go rachadh sé san iomaíocht i dtoghchán tosaigh Carolina Theas ar an 21 Eanáir.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
reference: Chinn Bachmann, a bhain an chéad áit amach sa suirbhé samplála Ames, deireadh a chur lena feachtas.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
reference: Aistríodh an grianghrafadóir chuig Ionad Míochaine UCLA Ronald Reagan, mar a fuair sé bás níos déanaí.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
reference: Tuairiscíodh go raibh sé sna 20idí. I ráiteas a eisíodh, deir Bieber "cé nach raibh mé i láthair nár nach raibh baint díreach agam leis an timpiste thragóideach, déanaim comhbhrón le muintir na n-íospartach."

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
reference: Tuigtear le TMZ, suíomh idirlín a bhaineann le nuacht siamsaíochta, gur stop an grianghrafadóir a fheithicil ar an taobh eile de Sepulveda Boulevard agus go ndearna sé iarracht ar phictiúir a ghlacadh den stad póilíní roimh dó dul trasna an bhóthair agus leanúint ar aghaidh; rud a chuir faoi deara ar phóilín de chuid California Highway Patrol a bhí ag stiúradh an staid tráchta, an grianghrafadóir a ordú ar ais trasna an bhóthair, faoi dhó.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
reference: De réir na bpóilíní, ní dócha go gcuirfear cúiseanna coiriúla i leith thiománaí na feithicle a bhuail an grianghrafadóir.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
reference: Gan ach ocht mbonn déag ar fáil in aghaidh an lae, theip ar roinnt tíortha áit a fháil ar ardán na mbonn.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
reference: Áirítear orthu an Ísiltír -- chríochnaigh Anna Jochemsen sa naoú háit i rang seasamh na mban sa Super-G inné -- agus an Fhionlainn -- chríochnaigh Katja Saarinen sa deichiú háit san imeacht chéanna.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: Chríochnaigh Mitchell Gourley ón Astráil san aonú háit déag i Super-G seasamh na bhfear. Tháinig Oldrich Jelinek, iomaitheoir Seiceach, sa séú háit déag i Super-G suí na bhfear.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
reference: Chríochnaigh Arly Velasquez as Meicsiceo sa chúigiú háit déag i Super-G suí na bhfear. Tháinig Adam Hall as an Nua-Shéalainn sa naoú háit i Super-G seasamh na bhfear.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: Chríochnaigh Maciej Krezel, an sciálaí lagamhairc fir ón bPolainn, agus an treoraí Anna Ogarzynska sa tríú háit déag sa Super-G. Chríochnaigh Jong Seork Park na Cóiré Theas sa cheathrú háit is fiche i Super-G suí na bhfear.

source: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.
reference: Tá an milleán á chur ar choimeádaithe síochána na Náisiún Aontaithe, a tháinig go Háití tar éis crith talún 2010, as scaipeadh an ghalair a thosaigh gar do champa na dtrúpaí.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
reference: Maítear sa chás dlí nach raibh dramhaíl ón gcampa UN díghalraithe i gceart, arb é sin an chúis le sceitheadh baictéar i gcraobh-abhainn na hAbhann Artibonite, atá ar cheann de na haibhneacha is mó atá ann in Háítí.

source: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.
reference: Ó na 1800í ar aghaidh, ní raibh aon fhadhb ag Háití a bhain leis an ngalar, go dtí gur tháinig trúpaí.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
reference: Tá tagairt déanta ag Institiúid Dlí agus Cirt agus Daonlathais Háítí do chineálacha staidéir neamhspleácha a thugann le tuiscint gur thug cathlán síochánaíochta Neipeal na Náisiún Aontaithe an galar go Háítí i ngan fhios dóibh.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
reference: Dúirt Danielle Lantagne, saineolaí ar an ngalar de chuid na Náisiún Aontaithe, gur dócha gurbh iad na coimeádaithe síochánta ba chúis leis an ráig.

source: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.
reference: Dhearbhaigh Hamilton gurbh é Howard University Hospital a thóg an othar isteach agus bail sheasmhach air/uirthi.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
reference: Chuaigh an t-othar go dtí an Nigéir, áit ar tharla roinnt cásanna den víreas Ebola.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
reference: Chloígh an t-ospidéal leis an bprótacal maidir le rialú ionfhabhtuithe, lena n-áirítear an t-othar a scaradh amach ó dhaoine eile chun nach scaipfí an t-ionfhabhtú ar dhaoine eile.

source: Before The Simpsons Simon had worked on several shows in various positions.
reference: Sula d'oibrigh sé ar The Simpsons, bhí Simon fostaithe le roinnt seónna i bpoist éagsúla.

source: During the 1980s he worked on shows such as Taxi, Cheers, and The Tracy Ullman Show.
reference: Le linn na 1980idí d'oibrigh sé ar chláir amhail Taxi, Cheers agus The Tracy Ullman Show.

source: In 1989 he helped create The Simpsons with Brooks and Groening, and was responsible for hiring the show's first writing team.
reference: In 1989 chabhraigh sé le Brooks agus Groening The Simpsons a chruthú, agus bhí sé freagrach as an gcéad fhoireann scríbhneoireachta den seó a fhostú.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
reference: Ainneoin gur éirigh sé as an seó i 1993, choinnigh sé a theideal mar léiritheoir feidhmiúcháin, mar sin níor stopadh na milliúin agus na milliúin dollar a bhí á bhfáil aige i ndleacht gach séasúr.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
reference: Thuairiscigh Xinhua, gníomhaireacht nuachta na Síne, níos túisce gur fuadaíodh eitleán.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
reference: Shonraigh tuairiscí níos déanaí go ndearnadh bagairt bhuama ar an eitleán agus cuireadh ar ais arís é chuig an Afganastáin, ag tuirlingt i Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
reference: Deir na tuairiscí luatha gur cuireadh an t-eitleán ar ais go dtí an Afganastáin tar éis nár ligeadh dó tuirlingt éigeandála a dhéanamh in Ürümqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
reference: Is minic a tharlaíonn timpistí aeir san Iaráin, a bhfuil a haerloingeas ag dul in aois agus nach gcoinnítear bail mhaith air don fheidhmiú sibhialta agus míleata araon.

source: International sanctions have meant that new aircraft cannot be purchased.
reference: Mar gheall ar smachtbhannaí idirnáisiúnta, ní féidir aerárthaí nua a cheannach.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
reference: Níos luaithe sa tseachtain seo, maraíodh triúr agus gortaíodh triúr eile i dtimpiste héileacaptair phóilíneachta.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
reference: An mhí seo caite bhí an tubaiste aeir is measa le blianta ag an Iaráin nuair a thuairteáil eitleán a bhí ag dul i dtreo na hAirméine, ag marú an 168 a bhí ar bord.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
reference: An mhí chéanna, theip ar aerárthach eile stopadh ar an rúidbhealach ag Mashhad, bhuail sé faoi bhalla agus maraíodh seachtar déag.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
reference: Chuir Aerosmith fuílleach na gceolchoirmeacha dá chamchuairt ar ceal.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
reference: Bhí an rac-bhanna le camchuairt a thabhairt ar na Stáit Aontaithe agus Ceanada go dtí an 16 Meán Fómhair.

source: They have cancelled the tour after lead singer Steven Tyler was injured after he fell off stage while performing on August 5.
reference: Chuir siad an chamchuairt ar ceal tar éis do Steven Tyler, an príomhamhránaí, titim den stáitse ar an 5 Lúnasa agus é ag canadh.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
reference: Chaill Murray an chéad seit i mbabhta réitigh tar éis don dá fhear a fhreastal féin a choimeád ó thús deireadh an tseite.

source: Del Potro had the early advantage in the second set, but this too required a tie break after reaching 6-6.
reference: Bhí an luath-bhuntáiste ag Del Potro sa dara seit, ach bhí cluiche réitigh de dhíth ansin freisin tar éis dóibh 6-6 a shroicheadh.

source: Potro received treatment to his shoulder at this point but managed to return to the game.
reference: Cuireadh cóireáil ar ghualainn Potro ag an bpointe seo ach d'éirigh leis filleadh ar an gcluiche.

source: The program started at 8:30 p.m. local time (15.00 UTC).
reference: Thosaigh an clár ar a 8.30 tráthnóna, am na háite (15.00 UTC).

source: Famous singers across the country presented bhajans, or devotional songs, to Shri Shyam's feet.
reference: Tháinig amhránaithe mór le rá ó cheann ceann na tíre le bhajans, is é sin amhráin chráifeachta, a chur i láthair ag cosa Shri Shyam.

source: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Chuir an t-amhránaí Sanju Sharma tús leis an tráthnóna, agus Jai Shankar Choudhary ina dhiaidh sin. Chuir Lakkha Singh an chhappan bhog bhajan i láthair freisin le tionlacan ón amhránaí Raju Khandelwal.

source: Then, Lakkha Singh took the lead in singing the bhajans.
reference: Ansin, chuaigh Lakkha Singh i gceannas ar chanadh na bhajan.

source: 108 plates of Chhappan Bhog (in Hinduism, 56 different edible items, like, sweets, fruits, nuts, dishes etc. which are offered to deity) were served to Baba Shyam.
reference: Riaradh 108 pláta de Chhappan Bhog ar Baba Shyam (san Hiondúchas, bíonn 56 earra bia inite ann amhail milseáin, torthaí, cnónna, miasa srl. a ofráiltear do dhia).

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Chuir Lakkha Singh an chhappan bhog bhaja i láthair fosta, le tionlacan ón amhránaí Raju Khandelwal.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
reference: Sa chur i láthair príomhthéama a bhí ann Déardaoin mar chuid den Seó Cluichíochta Thóiceo, thaispeáin Satoru Iwata, uachtarán ar Nintendo, dearadh an rialaitheora cluichíochta do chonsól nua na cuideachta ar a dtugtar Nintendo Revolution.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
reference: Cosúil le cianrialtán teilifíse, úsáideann an rialaitheoir dhá bhraiteoir a chuirtear in aice le teilifís an úsáideora chun a shuíomh a thriantánú i spás tríthoiseach.

source: This will allow players to control actions and movements in video games by moving the device through the air.
reference: Tabharfaidh sé seo deis d’imreoirí gníomhartha agus gluaiseachtaí i bhfíschluichí a rialú tríd an ngléas a bhogadh tríd an aer.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
reference: Chaill Giancarlo Fisichella smacht ar a charr agus chuir sé deireadh leis an rás go luath i ndiaidh dó tosú.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
reference: Ba é Fernando Alonso, a chomhimreoir, a bhí chun tosaigh den chuid is mó den rás, ach chríochnaigh sé é tar éis a stad sloic, b'fhéidir mar gheall ar an roth ar dheis a bheith sáinnithe.

source: Michael Schumacher ended his race not long after Alonso, because of the suspension damage in the numerous battles during the race.
reference: Chríochnaigh Michael Schumacher a rás go gairid i ndiaidh Alonso de bharr an damáiste don chrochadh sna cathanna líonmhara le linn an rása.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
reference: "Tá sí gleoite agus canann sí go maith, leis," a dúirt sé de réir thrascríbhinn den ócáid nuachta.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
reference: "Chuaigh gach cleachtadh a rinne muid go mór i bhfeidhm orm, ó mo chroí istigh."

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
reference: Thart ar 3 nóiméad tar éis an lainseála, thaispeáin ceamara ar bord go leor píosaí de chúrinsliú ag scoitheadh ón umar breosla.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
reference: Mar sin féin, ní chreidtear go ndearna siad aon damáiste don tointeálaí spáis.

source: NASA's shuttle program chief N. Wayne Hale Jr. said the foam had fallen "after the time we are concerned about."
reference: Dúirt N. Wayne Hale Jr., príomhfheidhmeannach chlár tointeála NASA gur thit an cúr "i ndiaidh an ama is ábhar imní dúinn."

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
reference: Bhí an taispeántas ar siúl ar feadh cúig nóiméad nuair a d'ardaigh an ghaoth, thart ar nóiméad ina dhiaidh sin tá luas 70km/h tagtha ar an ngaoth... ansin tosaíonn sé ag cur báistí, ach chomh hard agus chomh mór sin go mbuailtear do chraiceann le clabhtaí pianmhara, ansin thit clocha sneachta ón spéir, tháinig scaoll ar dhaoine, iad ag scréachach agus ag rith trasna ar a chéile.

source: I lost my sister and her friend, and on my way there were two disabled people in wheelchairs, people just jumping over and pushing them," Armand Versace said.
reference: Chaill mé mo dheirfiúr agus a cara, agus ar mo bhealach bhí beirt faoi mhíchumas i gcathaoireacha rothaí, daoine díreach ag léim thairis agus ag brú rompu," a dúirt Armand Versace.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
reference: Thuairiscigh NHK, chomh maith, go raibh stáisiún cumhachta núicléiche Kashiwazaki Kariwa i maorach Niigata ag feidhmiú mar is gnách.

source: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. reported no effects from the earthquake and that the Number 1 and 2 reactors at its Shika nuclear power plant were shut down.
reference: Níor tuairiscíodh Hokuriku Electric Power Co. éifeacht ar bith ón chrith talún agus dúradh go raibh imoibreoir uimhir 1 agus 2 sa stáisiún cumhachta dúnta.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
reference: Tuairiscíodh go bhfuil thart ar 9400 teach sa réigiún gan uisce agus thart ar 100 gan leictreachas.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
reference: Rinneadh damáiste do roinnt bóithre, tá cur isteach ar an tseirbhís iarnróid sna ceantair atá buailte, agus tá Aerfort Noto i maoracht Ishikawa fós dúnta.

source: One bomb exploded outside the governor general's office.
reference: Phléasc buama amháin lasmuigh d'oifig an ardghobharnóra.

source: Three more bombs exploded near government buildings in a period of two hours.
reference: Phléasc trí bhuama eile gar d’fhoirgnimh an rialtais i dtréimhse dhá uair an chloig.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
reference: Tá tuairiscí ann a deir gur cailleadh ochtar, agus deimhníonn tuairiscí oifigiúla gur gortaíodh suas le 30; ach níl na huimhreacha deiridh ar eolas go fóill.

source: Both cyanuric acid and melamine were found in urine samples from pets that died after consuming contaminated pet food.
reference: Fuarthas idir aigéad cyanuric agus mealaimín i samplaí fuail ó pheataí a fuair bás tar éis dóibh an bia peataí éillithe a ithe.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
reference: Imoibríonn an dá chomhdhúil lena chéile chun criostail a dhéanamh a d’fhéadfadh bac a chur ar fheidhm na nduán, a dúirt taighdeoirí san ollscoil.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
reference: Thug na taighdeoirí criostail faoi deara i mún an chait trí mhealaimín agus aigéad ciainiúrach a chur leis.

source: The composition of these crystals matches those found in the urine of affected pets when compared by infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).
reference: Tá comhdhéanamh na gcriostal seo ar aon dul leo siúd a fhaightear i bhfual peataí atá buailte nuair a chuirtear i gcomparáid iad le speictreascópacht infridhearg.

source: I don't know if you realize it or not, but most of the goods from Central America came into this country duty-free.
reference: Níl a fhios agam an dtuigeann tú é nó nach dtuigeann, ach tháinig an chuid is mó de na hearraí ó Mheiriceá Láir isteach sa tír seo saor ó dhleacht.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
reference: Fós féin, gearradh cáin ar ochtó faoin gcéad d'earraí trí tharaifí i dtíortha i Lár Mheiriceá. Déanaimid cineál ort.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
reference: Ní fhaca mise aon chiall ann, is cinnte nach raibh sé cóir.

source: All I say to people is you treat us the way we treat you.
reference: Níl le rá agam le daoine ach ba cheart caitheamh linne mar a gcaithimid libhse.

source: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger signed into law a bill that bans the sale or rental of violent video games to minors.
reference: Rinne Gobharnóir California Arnold Schwarzenegger bille a shíniú le bheith ina dhlí lena gcuirtear toirmeasc ar fhíschluichí foréigneacha a dhíol nó a ligean ar cíos do dhaoine atá faoi aois.

source: The bill requires violent video games sold in the state of California to be labeled with a decal reading "18" and makes their sale to a minor punishable by a fine of $1000 per offense.
